name: QRadar Audit: Shared Account
notes: This rule generates an offense when there is a potential shared account that is connected to QRadar. Add QRadar IP addresses to the QRadar Deployment – IP reference set to exclude them as source IP addresses.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of SIM Audit
when any of Source IP are contained in any of QRadar Deployment - IP
when the event matches Username is any of configservices
when at least 2 events are seen with the same Username, Event Name and different Source IP in 30 minutes
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Username, Event Name and different Source IP in 30 minutes
TD_list: APPLY QRadar Audit: Shared Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of SIM Audit
AND NOT when any of Source IP are contained in any of QRadar Deployment - IP
AND NOT when the event matches Username is any of configservices
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Username, Event Name and different Source IP in 30 minutes
RED_list: Event description: Detects when an account has been shared between multiple users.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
